spec: Hologram OS — canonical login gateway: rEFInd → Plymouth → SDDM (real theme run by the Holo QML engine) → PrimeOS, authenticated by a self-sovereign key bound to local hardware (holospaces docs/08; Laws L1/L4/L5), 100% serverless

the QML ENGINE runs the real SDDM theme → DOM (a self-sovereign sign-in affordance + field)
the real theme's images paint (wallpaper Background + rectangle.png panel)
a self-sovereign key enrols + a session opens, hardware-bound (operator ⊗ host ⊗ session, all content-addressed)
the session assertion re-derives + signature-verifies (Law L5)
the ONE shell (apps/sdk) receives the handoff: sovereign operator + host stamped, desktop ready
